overview.minides: Volkswagen's MQB A0 IN-platform compact SUV — the driver's choice in the segment, now refreshed with connected LED lighting, illuminated VW logo, 10.1-inch AI touchscreen, panoramic sunroof, and a new 8-speed automatic.
overview.description: The Volkswagen Taigun received its first major facelift in 2026, introducing a sharper front-end with connected full LED headlamps, a full-width light bar, and an illuminated VW logo. Inside, the update brings a larger 10.1-inch touchscreen with Google Gemini AI integration, a new 10.25-inch digital cluster, panoramic sunroof, rear massage seats, and ventilated front seats on higher trims. The powertrain lineup comprises a 1.0L three-cylinder TSI (115 PS / 178 Nm) — now available with a new smoother 8-speed torque converter automatic replacing the old 6-speed — and a 1.5L four-cylinder TSI EVO with Active Cylinder Technology (150 PS / 250 Nm) paired with a 7-speed DSG. All variants carry a 5-star Global NCAP safety rating. The range spans 11 variants from Comfortline to the range-topping GT Plus Sport DSG.
